entries.question: Where is my RSVP access code?
entries.answer: Your access code should be printed on a separate slip of paper inside your invitation envelope. If you can't find yours (or are having trouble RSVPing), please email thehabers2026@gmail.com.

entries.question: How do I change my RSVP status?
entries.answer: Once you RSVP on the website, you cannot change your status. Please email thehabers2026@gmail.com if your plans change.

entries.question: I'm from out of town. Do you have a hotel suggestion?
entries.answer: Yes, we have rooms reserved at the Courtyard by Marriott in Silver Spring North/White Oak. There are single king bed rooms available for $149 and double queen bed rooms for $169 which must be booked by September 4th. To reserve, either call 301-680-8500 and mention the Vanden Berg/Haber Wedding or use the following reservation link.

entries.question: What is the wedding dress code?
entries.answer: The dress code is semi-formal/cocktail. Please note that while the ceremony will be held inside, our reception will be held in a covered outdoor pavilion, so pay attention to the weather!

entries.question: Is there parking available at the wedding/reception venue?
entries.answer: There is plenty of free parking at both the church and the reception venue. However, you should arrive 20–30 minutes prior to the ceremony to ensure that you find parking and seating in plenty of time.

entries.question: Can I take pictures during the ceremony?
entries.answer: No. Unfortunately taking your own photos blocks other guests' views and distracts the wedding party. We will have a professional photographer at the ceremony.

entries.question: Who took all of these amazing photos?
entries.answer: The home page images and “polaroid” style pictures were taken by Caleb's Aunt Becky during their engagement. The photos on our “About Us” page are a combination of photos taken by Caleb's Mom, his sister Grace, and selfies taken by us :)

entries.question: These invitations are beautiful! Where did you get them?
entries.answer: Emma designed the text and layout, then her incredibly talented grandma Willow Vanden Berg hand-painted the flowers and Bible verse for us to print!

entries.question: Wow, this website is so cool! Who designed it? (Oh no! Something on this website is broken…)
entries.answer: Caleb recently earned a degree in computer science and decided to program this wedding website in his free time! If you think something is broken or if you are having trouble RSVPing, please reach out to him at thehabers2026@gmail.com.
